Deprecated. The name of the cluster. This field has been deprecated and replaced by the name field.
Deprecated. The name of the Google Compute Engine [zone](https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/zones#available) in which
Deprecated. The name of the node pool to delete. This field has been deprecated and replaced by the name field.

can_come_from.note: [tier 2/suffix_match] call gcp.container.projects.locations.clusters.list, iterate response["clusters"][], extract item["name"] → use as "clusterId"
[tier 2/suffix_match] call gcp.container.projects.locations.clusters.nodePools.list, iterate response["nodePools"][], extract item["name"] → use as "nodePoolId"
